flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Moraine Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Moraine Valley Community College are 14% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($43.9k vs $38.4k).
